name: Mission Control
description: turbodot's personal dashboard — a Linear-inspired control center. Full Next.js 14 app with Kanban tasks, Calendar, Projects, Memory, Docs, Team, Office/City nav, and Activity Feed. Running on port 3333.

name: ResumeBot
description: AI-powered job search automation system. Resume Workshop (4 lanes A/B/C/D), Job Pipeline (Deal Desk cards), Approval Queue, Scout Config, and outreach modal. Integrated with Make.com webhook.

name: ContentBot
description: LinkedIn content machine for Charles Sacco CFP. Content Hub (split-screen queue + composer), Viral Posts (Taplio-style), Analytics (Buffer live stats), Art Director agent (QuickChart auto-graphs), Make.com → Buffer pipeline.

name: Infrastructure & Memory
description: OpenClaw gateway config, lossless-claw DAG memory plugin, SSH remote access setup, LAN/PC access, Discord bot pairing, and agent memory system (daily logs + MEMORY.md).

name: Gateway & API Housekeeping
description: Audit OpenClaw gateway config, API keys, rate limits, and deprecated code paths after repeated re-onboards.

name: Layout + ContentBot responsive refinement
description: Update global layout and ContentBot UI to improve hierarchy, reduce density, and add responsive resizing features: collapsible sidebar, resizable Content Studio composer, and lighter timeline density with per-day overflow handling.

name: Model Value Watch
description: Weekly model value reporting from Artificial Analysis plus first-run workspace report generation and unemployment reports section setup.

name: Secrets Vault
description: Build a private Mission Control vault for APIs, credentials, and password rules with add-more flows and safe masked display.

name: Integrated Business Architecture Pack
description: Generate an 11-document business architecture pack for Mike spanning manifesto, resume, tech spec, SaaS autopsy, migration logic, pitch, adoption, system instructions, agreement, training playbook, and onboarding kit.

name: IBA Dashboard Live Build
description: Transform the /iba directory into a live Mission Control dashboard with interactive tabs, calculators, script generation, and persistent operational behavior.

name: Mission Control reality audit and plumbing repair
description: Audit live Mission Control sections against real connected data/services, repair broken plumbing where possible, and report status section-by-section.

name: GitHub Profile & Portfolio Setup
description: Create and populate Mike's GitHub profile, profile README, repo descriptions, and visible portfolio context from existing workspace projects and resume-aligned positioning.

name: Identify recurring subscriptions across 3 Gmail accounts
description: Scan the three authorized Gmail accounts over the last 3-5 months, infer recurring subscription vendors from recurring billing/receipt emails, and add the findings into the workspace for follow-up/use.

name: Editable Mission Control navigation
description: Make the sidebar/menu editable so items can be renamed and moved between sections in the control UI.

name: Control UI menu customization
description: Add drag-and-drop menu organization, renaming controls, and richer visual styling to the OpenClaw control UI sidebar menu.

name: Openclaw Trader - Notion Portfolio Population
description: Create 34 Notion entries for P-OCTRADE: project page, R-TRADE101 educational knowledge base with 24 trading concept notes, 4 API object notes (Alpaca, FRED, Finnhub, Polymarket), and 5 bridge tasks. PARA schema compliant.
